title: Annie Laurie
description: A lyrical Scottish folk ballad arranged for the runtime-backed letter-note and fingering chart song page.
alignedLyrics: Max well ton's braes are bon nie where ear ly falls the _
dew _ and its there that Ann ie Lau rie gied me her pro mise
true gied me her pro mise true which ne'er for got will be and for
bon nie Ann ie _ Lau rie I'd _ lay _ me down and dee.
